input.query_context: Inspect source for California condor regulatory history under 50 CFR 17.95

why_it_matters: Regulatory analysts need to distinguish authoritative codified text from secondary summaries or metadata-only records.
notes: Modeled on a current guided regulatory workflow.

input.query_context: Inspect ECOS species profile for California condor in a regulatory session

why_it_matters: Users need to know when a source is authoritative metadata that still merits direct inspection before relying on its contents.

input.query_context: Inspect one article returned in a PFAS remediation literature review

why_it_matters: Scientists and consultants need source inspection to reveal whether a paper is verified metadata only, abstract-only, or fully observed.

input.query_context: Inspect a Federal Register notice included in the California condor regulatory timeline

why_it_matters: Timeline work depends on distinguishing notices worth direct reading from weaker derivative references.

input.query_context: Inspect a source that is on-topic and verified in metadata but not yet full-text verified

why_it_matters: Evidence should stay usable when metadata is trustworthy, but the system must remain honest about full-text gaps.
notes: Seed slice for trust-state nuance rather than direct-source authority.
